claim_boundary: v6.0.4 proves linear phase no-selection and finds one exact round-S7 octave commensurability, but the accepted parent family does not supply the selected nonlinear field, coefficient, stable coherent solution, or negative invariant sigma-Hessian shift needed for physicality selection.
phase_sensitivity: C2 is phase blind; a phase-sensitive invariant requires the action-derived restricted interaction energy S_int[P_R Psi]
projector: P_R=sum_a |e_a><e_a| for an orthonormal basis of the geometrically selected resonant subspace
stress_cross_term: not defined until the geometry distinguishes the spectral decomposition
